---
title: "CorrLMEResult"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel mixed model with a structured within-group residual (R2 + corr)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme`](../nitrix-stats-lme.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats.lme._corrfit`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CorrLMEResult -->
```python
class CorrLMEResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:CorrLMEResult -->
Per-voxel mixed model with a structured within-group residual (R2 + corr).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:CorrLMEResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(beta_hat: Float[Array, 'V p'], cov_re: Float[Array, 'V r r'], sigma_e_sq: Float[Array, 'V'], rho: Float[Array, 'V'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], corr: str, tier: str, blups: Optional[Float[Array, 'V q r']] = None) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:CorrLMEResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `r` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
